Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Defendant To Retain Counsel And Striking Answer If Defendant Fails To Comply Within Twenty (20) Days

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS INC.'S Motion For Order Requiring Defendant To Retain Counsel And Striking Answer If Defendant Fails To Comply Within Twenty (20) Days is Off calendar. Motion withdrawn per notice filed August 17, 2016.
